settings.title: Monster Piercing | Accessories
settings.text:
Body jewellery accessories are essential for maintaining and customising your piercings.

At Monster Piercing, we offer a wide range of accessories to complement your body jewellery collection. Whether you're looking for replacement balls, O-rings, or specialised tools, our accessories collection has everything you need to keep your jewellery secure and stylish. Replacement parts are available in various sizes and materials, ensuring compatibility with your existing jewellery. 

Customising your piercings with different ends or decorative elements can help refresh your look without needing to buy entirely new pieces. Our accessories collection is designed to make maintaining and personalising your piercings both convenient and affordable.

settings.question: What types of accessories and parts do you offer?
settings.answer: Our Accessories Collection includes a wide range of threadless and internally threaded jewellery parts, such as decorative tops, posts, and bases. You’ll find compatible pieces in titanium, steel, silver, and gold, designed to let you customise and refresh your piercings easily.

settings.question: What are threadless and internally threaded tops?
settings.answer:
• Threadless tops use a push-fit system where the decorative end is held securely in place by tension. They’re smooth, easy to insert, and ideal for sensitive piercings.
  • Internally threaded tops screw into the post’s internal thread, ensuring a secure fit and smooth insertion with no exposed threads.

Both
options provide a professional-grade hold, giving you freedom to mix and match your jewellery with ease.

settings.question: Can I mix materials between tops and bases?
settings.answer: Each material type should only be used with its corresponding base or top. For example, titanium tops are compatible only with titanium bases, gold tops with gold bases, and so on. This ensures a perfect thread or tension fit, prevents corrosion between metals, and maintains biocompatibility and visual consistency.

settings.question: What materials are your accessories made from?
settings.answer:
All parts are made from premium-quality materials:

  • Implant-grade titanium (ASTM
    F136)     – hypoallergenic and ideal for new piercings.
  • Solid gold (14K) – luxurious and suitable for healed piercings.
  • 316L surgical steel – durable and corrosion-resistant.
  • 925 sterling silver – perfect for decorative use in healed piercings.

Each top and base is crafted to match precisely within its own material type.
